name: Hash Brown Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 4 medium Size red or baking potatoes; diced
1 medium Size green bell peppers; chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the potatoes well and cut into 1/3 inch cubes.
2. Heat oil in a large non-stick pan over medium heat.
3. Stir in the potatoes, bell pepper, salt, and black pepper.
4. Cover and cook, stirring occasionally, until the potatoes are cooked through and crisp, about 20 to 25 minutes.
5. Stir in the chives before serving.
Food Exchange per Serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE; CAL: 68; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 11g; PRO: 1g; SOD: 115mg; FAT: 2g.
